About Me

High-energy
Technocrat

A versatile Senior .NET Developer with nearly 5 years of successful career delivering prestigious projects of large magnitude within strict time schedules.

Experienced in ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, Windows and Web applications, and Azure cloud services. Strong background in design patterns (Singleton, Facade) and SDLC methodologies including Waterfall and Agile SCRUM.

Capable of managing projects end-to-end, right from requirement gathering to design and implementation. Known for timely delivery and earning client appreciation across multiple engagements.
